title: Trump 'safe' after being rushed from stage
shortDescription: Trump appeared to have blood on his face as he left the stage after being pushed to ground by Secret Service agents.

title: Former President Donald Trump rushed from stage, cause unknown
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump was rushed off stage by U.S. Secret Service after popping noises rattled the crowd.

title: 'Herb Kohl Way' briefly becomes 'Donald J. Trump Way' ahead of RNC
shortDescription: Workers setting up for the RNC briefly covered a sign for "Herb Kohl Way" outside Fiserv Forum with a new one that read "Donald J. Trump Way."

title: The Macho convention: Republicans appeal to men with UFC's Dana White
shortDescription: The GOP has long held leads among men in presidential elections. At the Republican convention, the party wants to continue to make strides with young men.

title: Tucker Carlson and Amber Rose among speakers to back Trump at RNC
shortDescription: The Republican National Convention will feature speakers like Tucker Carlson, Amber Rose and Lee Greenwood as Donald Trump is nominated for president.

title: Melania Trump to join former President Donald Trump at GOP convention
shortDescription: The former first lady has been little-seen on the campaign trail

title: Bernie Sanders will do all he can to get Biden reelected: NYT op-ed
shortDescription: Biden has faced pressure from those within his party to step aside in the 2024 presidential election.

title: Donald Trump speaks in Pennsylvania; will his running mate be there?
shortDescription: Former president and presumptive 2024 Republican nominee Donald Trump holds his last pre-convention rally Saturday

title: 3 ways a Trump administration could erode voting rights: ACLU study
shortDescription: As Donald Trump prepares to accept the Republican presidential nomination, the ACLU warns that his administration would make it harder to vote.

title: Biden vows to stay as crowd goes wild at raucous Detroit rally
shortDescription: President Joe Biden took his campaign to Michigan Friday in a push to shift attention from the battle in his party to Donald Trump and Project 2025.

title: Biden, Trump in dead heat despite calls for president to step aside
shortDescription: Recent polling suggests that Biden, Trump are locked in a dead heat despite calls for the president to step aside.

title: Voters back home tell Dems to drop Biden
shortDescription: Democratic lawmakers are facing pressure from their constituents to call for Biden to drop out and some are up for reelection.

title: Which Democrats have called for Biden to step aside?
shortDescription: A growing list of Democratic lawmakers have called for President Joe Biden to step aside. Here's who they are.

title: Hakeem Jeffries met with Biden after week of turmoil among Dems
shortDescription: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries told members Friday that he met with the president, but didn't say if he asked him to leave the race.

title: Biden pushes through flubs in NATO press conference | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: New poll finds that most Democrats want Joe Biden to drop out of the race. Inflation eased more than expected in June. It's all on The Excerpt.

title: Has a Supreme Court justice ever been impeached? Yes – in 1805.
shortDescription: To get a federal official impeached, you have to go through both the House and Senate. Have these checks and balances ever gone to the Supreme Court?

title: Some in GOP urged McConnell to step down after freezing | Fact check
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump and Georgia Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene were among those who said McConnell was unfit to lead Senate Republicans.

title: Clyburn 'all in' on Biden, defends president's reelection campaign
shortDescription: The South Carolina Democrat, key to Biden's success four years ago, pushed back in an interview Friday on calls for the president to drop out.

title: Celebrities who have called for Joe Biden to step down
shortDescription: Prominent celebrities are increasingly voicing concerns over President Joe Biden's capability to run for re-election, urging him to step aside for a new Democratic nominee.

title: Biden tells rowdy rally 'I am running and we're gonna win': Recap
shortDescription: President Joe Biden took a Detroit campaign rally by storm as he worked to restore confidence among Democratic lawmakers.
